since_last: 67% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.83%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.16% · BTC +1.10% · Gold -0.02% · Nasdaq100 +0.65%. 67% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.83%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.83%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.10%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +5.37%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.37%, TER +5.02%, MDB +4.80%, MU +4.74%, MRVL +4.66%. Laggards: ORCL -3.25%, AAPL -2.93%, AI -2.48%, DELL -2.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.01% at $122.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.01% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
